summary: Testing completed for CRM Alpha Agency - Invoices/Budget APIs and Contact Form E2E. Backend APIs mostly working (21/23 tests passed). Contact form E2E with Radix UI Select working perfectly.

critical.issue: Route conflict: routes/budget.py uses 'budget_entries' collection while server.py uses 'budget' collection. GET by ID returns 404 because data is stored in wrong collection.
Same route conflict - update fails because entry not found in 'budget_entries' collection

minor.issue: Duplicate routes exist in both server.py and routes/budget.py with different collection names (db.budget vs db.budget_entries). Need to consolidate.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix budget route conflict - routes/budget.py uses 'budget_entries' collection but server.py uses 'budget' collection. Either remove duplicate routes from server.py or update routes/budget.py to use same collection.
Remove duplicate budget routes from server.py (lines 3484-3651) since routes/budget.py is already included via app.include_router()
critical_code_review_comments: Route duplication: Budget routes exist in both server.py and routes/budget.py with different MongoDB collections
server.py budget routes use: db.budget collection
This causes GET/PUT by ID to fail because POST creates in one collection but GET looks in another
seed_data_creation: Test contacts and invoices created with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Budget API has route conflict between server.py and routes/budget.py. The routes/budget.py module is included but uses different collection name. Contact form E2E with Radix UI Select is working correctly with data-testid selectors.

auth_api.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Returns token and user info

invoices_api.POST /api/invoices: PASS - Creates invoice with FAC-YYYY-XXXX number
invoices_api.PUT /api/invoices/{id}: PASS - Updates invoice and recalculates totals

invoice_payments_api.POST /api/invoices/{id}/payments: PASS - Adds payment and updates status
invoice_payments_api.full_payment_status: PASS - Marks invoice as 'payée' when fully paid

lead_api.POST /api/lead: PASS - Public endpoint for contact form

contact_form_e2e.radix_select: PASS - Select opens and options clickable with data-testid
contact_form_e2e.form_submission: PASS - Submits successfully with success message
